hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tighter text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing (p-8 to p-16), aggressive asymmetry in hero sections, tight and dense Bento grids for menu items.
layout_and_spacing.card_styling: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[#F5A623]/50 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(245,166,35,0.1)]

navigation.elements: Brand Logo, Links (Menu, Trust, Location), Language Switcher (DE/EN), Cart Icon with Badge
navigation.mobile: Hamburger menu, solid dark background sheet

hero.layout: Asymmetric split or text overlaid on highly cinematic darkened image background (bg-black/60).

ctas.primary: bg-[#F5A623] text-black font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-[#DFA000] transition-colors
ctas.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-colors

menu_section.item_card: Vertical layout, high-quality image on top (max-h-48 object-cover rounded-t-xl), bold title, description, ingredients list (text-sm text-zinc-500), price tag (text-[#F5A623]), 'Add to Cart' button (icon or full width)

order_system.toggle: Segmented control (Delivery / Pickup / Contactless) - Shadcn Tabs
order_system.cart: Slide-out Sheet (Shadcn Sheet) showing selected items, extras, total, and Checkout button
order_system.checkout: Integrated Stripe flow (mocked visually or basic form)

trust_section.style: Dark textured background (restaurant vibe), large '4.2' typography in gold, 5 stars (4 filled, 1 half), 'Warum Musa's Burger?' value props (Local, Authentic, Late Night).

location_section.layout: Split: Left side details (Address, Phone, Hours), Right side Map Placeholder (dark themed static image or gray box with 'Map Area' for integration).

mobile_specific.sticky_order_button: Fixed to bottom of viewport on mobile (z-40), full width, highly visible #F5A623 background, text 'Jetzt bestellen'.

admin_dashboard.style: Dense, technical grid (Archetype 4 structural), Shadcn UI elements, dark theme.
admin_dashboard.features: Orders list, Menu item management (CRUD), toggle store status.

hero_burger.description: Delicious gourmet cheeseburger with fresh arugula. Use as main hero background with dark overlay or standalone feature image.

beef_burger.description: Beef burger with lettuce and tomato on dark background

chicken_burger.description: Chicken burger with lettuce and mayo

veggie_burger.description: Floating deconstructed burger ingredients (use for veggie or general category)

restaurant_vibe.description: Modern restaurant interior with checkered floor and neon signs. Use for Trust section background.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide React for UI actions. Use highly contrasted icons for features.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML + Tailwind for marketing/landing page sections to achieve organic, non-generic layouts.
Use Shadcn UI primarily for interactive logic (Tabs, Cart Sheet, Admin Tables, Dialogs).
Apply 'dark' class to html/body globally to ensure dark mode.
Implement the 'Jetzt bestellen' sticky mobile button dynamically, hiding it on larger screens.
Ensure the hero image has an overlay like bg-black/50 or a gradient overlay so text remains legible.
All interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute.
Build the Admin Dashboard with Shadcn components, focusing on density and function.
Implement language switcher (DE/EN) using a simple context or state, toggling static strings.
DO NOT use placeholder text for images. Use the provided media URLs.
